# Forever Here — QRHeadstone

> A QR story platform for people and pets. Families fill out a short form; a first-person narrative is written in that person's own voice. A QR code is created and can be placed on a headstone, ash vase, photo frame, remembrance shrine, memorial jersey, or any photo. When someone scans it, they read the story as if the person themselves is speaking.

## What it does

- Families describe a loved one or pet through a guided form (personality, memories, relationships, sensory details)
- A first-person narrative is written from those details, in English, Spanish, or both
- A QR code is created and linked permanently to the story page
- The QR can be printed on sticker paper or engraved and placed on any physical object — headstones, urns, frames, jerseys, benches, shirts
- Visitors can leave memories and messages on the story page
- Family can edit the narrative, add photos, music links, and legacy links (social media, published work, etc.)

## Two modes

- **In Memory Of** — for someone who has passed. Past-tense form, memorial tone, first-person narrative looking back on a life.
- **Their Story** — for any living person or pet. Present-tense form, no date of passing, first-person narrative in the present tense. Designed to give any photo its voice — place the QR on the back of a photo, a frame, a canvas.

## Key pages

- `/` — Landing page
- `/create` — Pre-step mode selection, then three-step form to create a memorial or story
- `/remember/[id]` — Individual story page (public, scannable by anyone with the QR code)
- `/sitemap.xml` — Dynamic sitemap of all active story pages

## Supported languages

English and Spanish. Narratives can be written in either or both languages.

## Who uses it

- Families who have lost a loved one and want to create a lasting digital memorial
- Pet owners who want to honor a companion animal
- Anyone who wants to give a photo — of a grandparent, a parent, a friend — its own voice
- Funeral homes looking to offer a modern memorial service

## Technology

Built with TanStack Start, React, Supabase (PostgreSQL + storage), and Anthropic Claude for narrative generation.

## Contact

Site: https://www.qrheadstone.com
Brand: Forever Here
